⏰ Reminders
↓ all writes encrypt via AES-256-GCM → ghPut() → GitHub commits
notes/index.enc + {id}.enc
bottles/data.enc
accessions/data.enc
recipes/data.enc
greenhouse/data.enc
supplies/data.enc
journal/entries.enc
value/data.enc
taxonomy/custom.enc
📦 Data 🔑 Login 🧭 Nav 📋 Notes 🫙 Bottles 🏡 GH 🏠 Dash 🤖 AI 📊 Analytics 🌍 GBIF 💰 Value 📥 Export ⚠️ Gaps
📦
Data Architecture
State object S · GitHub enc/dec cycle · session cache · 16 fields tracked
S.* ghGet/ghPut AES-256-GCM 16 state fields
›

📦 Data Architecture

State Object S — all fields

FieldLoaded byRead byGitHub file
S.notes[]login → loadNotesIndex()renderNoteList, openNote, LabAnalytics, _buildAIContext, Reminders, Dashboard, Searchnotes/index.enc + notes/{id}.enc
S.accs[]login → loadAccessions()renderAccList, openAccession, openBottle, Searchaccessions/data.enc
S.recs[]login → loadRecipes()renderRecList, openRecipe, bottle form, Searchrecipes/data.enc
S.bottles[] + S.sessions[]login → loadBottles()renderBottleList, openBottle, Dashboard, Reminders, Analytics, Species, Searchbottles/data.enc
S.greenhouse[] + S.ghTransfers[]login → loadGreenhouse()renderGHList, openGHPlant, Dashboard, Reminders, Searchgreenhouse/data.enc
S.supplies[]login → loadSupplies()SupplyInventory.renderInventoryPage, calcPerformance, Dashboard low-stocksupplies/data.enc
S.journal[]login → loadJournal()renderJournalList, overnight parser, _buildAIContextjournal/entries.enc
S.valuelogin → loadValue() (8th load)renderValueSection, vault calculationvalue/data.enc
S.taxSpecies[]post-login loadTaxonomy()_taxSuggest, species picker, _buildAIContext, Species sectiontaxonomy/*.json packs (read-only)
S.taxCustomloadTaxonomy() → ghGetSpecies custom tab, _taxSuggest, flairs, GBIF importstaxonomy/custom.enc
S.analyticsLabAnalytics.calculate() at login + after saves_buildAIContext only (renderAnalytics recalculates inline)— (memory only)
S.weatherfetchWeather() at login, every 60sweather-chip display, _buildAIContext— (Open-Meteo API)
S_inv (separate object)loadInv() on Stock section visit (not at login)renderInv, saveInvinventory/data.enc
S.cur / S.editing / S.curBot / S.curGHopenNote, openBottle, openGHPlantdetail renderers, save actions (edit vs create branch)— (UI state)
S.bottleFilter / S.bottleSearch / S.botBatchFiltersetBotFilter, viewBatch, search inputrenderBottleList (priority: batchFilter → statusFilter → search)— (UI state)
S.sectionswitchSection()navTo, switchSection, mobile sidebar checks— (UI state)

Encryption cycle

JS object→ JSON.stringify→ enc() AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2(600k)→ ghPut() btoa → GitHub API PUT→ new sha stored in S.*Sha
ghGet() GitHub API GET→ ghDec() atob→ dec() crypto.subtle.decrypt→ JSON.parse → S.*

Session cache (10-min TTL)

_writeCache() saves notes + accs + recs + bottles + greenhouse + taxCustom to sessionStorage._lc. Cache restored on next login if <10 minutes old — skips 7 API calls. Supplies, journal, and value are NOT cached — re-fetched every session.

🔑
Login / Unlock Flow
Single-token auth · 8 parallel loads · device trust · migration tool
login() _readCache() _migrateEncryption() 8 data loads
›

🔑 Login / Unlock Flow

Login sequence — single path, 8 stages
PAT token
auth + encrypt key
→
validate()
HTTPS check · repo access
→
_readCache()
10-min TTL
HIT ↓
restore 5 stores
⚡ instant
MISS ↓
Promise.all( loadNotesIndex · loadAccessions · loadRecipes · loadBottles · loadGreenhouse · loadSupplies · loadJournal · loadValue )
↓
_writeCache()
↓
Hide #login → show #app
→
renderAll()
→
loadTaxonomy()
→
LabAnalytics.calculate()
→
fetchWeather()
→
_doWriteSummary()
1Read GitHub token → S.tok = S.pw = tok. If DEVICE_KEY in localStorage → restore token.
2Validate HTTPS (required for crypto.subtle). GET /repos/Phyto-Evolution/tcplants → verify access.
3Migration check: if dec() throws OperationError → show #lmigrate panel → _migrateEncryption(oldPw) re-encrypts all .enc files.
4Cache hit → restore from sessionStorage (skip 8 API calls). Cache miss → Promise.all 8 loads:
loadNotesIndex() · loadAccessions() · loadRecipes() · loadBottles() · loadGreenhouse() · loadSupplies() · loadJournal() · loadValue()
5Hide #login → show #app → render all lists → show UI chrome (FAB, AI btn, footer bar, actlog)
6loadTaxonomy() · loadEncryptedKeys() · fetchActivityLog() · device trust banner check
7LabAnalytics.calculate() → S.analytics · _scheduleOvernightJournalParse() (8s delay) · fetchWeather() + 60s interval
8setTimeout(_doWriteSummary, 5000) → commits lab-summary.json

Device trust

ActionResult
Trust Yesenc(S.tok) → localStorage.DEVICE_KEY — next visit restores token automatically
Trust NoBanner dismissed — token must be re-entered next visit
Forget devicelocalStorage.removeItem(DEVICE_KEY) — token field shown on login again
🧭
Navigation System
navTo() · switchSection() · drawer vs full-page · URL routing
navTo() switchSection() viewBatch() ›

🧭 Navigation System

Section typenavTo() behaviourExamples
List sectionsOpens nav drawer + switches to nd-{sec} panel. Drawer stays open as sidebar.notes, registry, recipes, bottles, greenhouse
Full-page sectionsCloses drawer, hides all nd panels, triggers section render function.reminders, contam, analytics, species, schedule, journal, supply, value, search, logicflows
stockRedirected → navTo('supply') (Stock deprecated in v3.11)—

Section render triggers (via switchSection)

SectionRender call
remindersrenderReminders()
contamrenderContamDashboard()
analyticsrenderAnalytics()
speciesrenderSpecies()
calendarrenderCalendar()
news_renderPersistedPins() + handleNewsToggle()
steriliseloadCustomSterilProtocol() or renderSterilPage()
valuerenderValueSection()
bottles, greenhouserenderBottleList() + showBotEmpty() / renderGHList()
✓ Canonical cross-section pattern: navTo('bottles'); openBottle(id) — navTo opens the drawer first, then the detail function populates the main area. Calling openBottle(id) alone without navTo breaks because the section may not be active.

Special navigation

viewBatch(batchId): sets S.botBatchFilter = batchId, clears other filters → openNavDrawer(); renderBottleList() — list shows only that batch.

_handleNavQRResult(): scans URL params on load — ?bottle=id → open bottle · ?note=id → open note · ?gh=id → open GH plant (v3.11)

📋
Notes — Full CRUD Flow
4 ops · draft · wiki-links · history · keyword stems
saveNoteAction()openNote()saveNotesIndex()
›

📋 Notes — Full CRUD Flow

CREATE:
  startNewNote('generic'|'tc')
  → clear form fields, set S.editing=null
  → show #note-editor, hide #note-view
  → _wireDraftListeners() already active: oninput → sessionStorage draft save

  saveNoteAction():
  → read all form fields: title, body, type, stage, species, tags, review, recipe_id, cultures_out
  → if isGeneric: cultures_out=null, pinned from checkbox
  → validateNoteData({id:'dummy',title,body,...}) ← Haiku addition, throws on invalid
  → disable save button
  → if S.editing:
      ghGet(DIR/{S.editing}.enc)               ← read current body + sha
      writeNote(S.editing, body, sha, msg)      ← ghPut body file
      saveNotesIndex(patchFn)                   ← update index (read-fresh, patch, write)
  → else (new note):
      id = uid(), date = now (or S.calDate if set from calendar)
      S.calDate = null
      writeNote(id, body, null, msg)            ← ghPut body file (sha=null → create)
      saveNotesIndex(ns => ns.push({id,title,date,...}))
  → _writeCache(); populateTagsDatalist(); _clearDraft()
  → renderNoteList(); openNote(S.cur); closeNavDrawer()
  → toast 'Saved ✓'

  saveNotesIndex(patchFn) — LOCK mechanism:
  → returns _notesSaveLock = _notesSaveLock.then(async()=>{...})
  → ALWAYS reads fresh SHA first (ghGet(IDX)) to avoid conflicts
  → applies patchFn to fresh notes array
  → ghPut(IDX, enc(JSON.stringify(updated)), freshSha)
  → returns {sha, notes}

READ:
  openNote(id):
  → S.cur = id; S.editing = null
  → find note in S.notes (index metadata)
  → ghGet(DIR/{id}.enc) → body loaded (cached in S.bodyCache)
  → sanitizeMarkdown(_wikiPreprocess(body)) → #nv-body.innerHTML
  → render badges: species link, stage, type, tags, linked bottles count, linked recipe
  → renderBacklinks(id) — notes containing [[id]]

  renderNoteList():
  → reads S.notes with filters: typeFilter, stageFilter, searchQ
  → overdue filter: next_review < today
  → sorted by pinned first, then date desc
  → emits .n-item divs with data-id attrs → tap handler → openNote

UPDATE:
  editNote() → S.editing = S.cur → populate form fields → show editor
  saveNoteAction() same as create but patches existing index entry + overwrites body file

DELETE:
  deleteNote() → confirm → ghDel(DIR/{id}.enc) → saveNotesIndex(remove by id) → renderNoteList → showNote('empty')

DRAFT SYSTEM:
  _wireDraftListeners() → oninput on note fields → debounced sessionStorage save
  On startNewNote: check sessionStorage for draft → if found: show restore banner
  _clearDraft() → sessionStorage.removeItem

WIKI-LINKS:
  _wikiPreprocess(body): finds [[title]] patterns → replaces with 
  Click wikilink → openNote(data-note-id)
  openWikiModal() → search S.notes by title → select → insert [[title]] into editor
  renderBacklinks(id) → S.notes.filter(n=>n.body contains [[id]]) → backlinks panel

NOTE HISTORY:
  fetchNoteHistory(id) → GitHub commits API /repos/.../commits?path=notes/{id}.enc
  → list with sha, date, author → click → ghGet(sha ref) → dec → show in modal → restore option

CAMERA/BARCODE in notes:
  openCamera() → getUserMedia → _startCam() → ZXing BrowserQRCodeReader
  → decode QR → insertBarcodeResult(text) → appended to ne-body textarea
🫙
Bottles — Full CRUD & Lifecycle
3 creation modes · passage tracking · QR labels · filters
saveBottleAction()updateBottleStatus()_botNextSeq()
›

🫙 Bottles — Full CRUD & Lifecycle

Creation modes + lifecycle flow
＋ Single
startNewBottle('single')
↓
saveBottleAction()
↓
1 bottle · FSL-YYYY-NNNN
↓
openBottle() + QR inline
⊞ Batch
setBotMode('batch')
↓
saveBottleAction()
↓
N bottles · shared batch_id
↓
_showSavedQRGrid()
🔥 Session
setBotMode('session')
↓
saveSessionAction()
↓
all batches · shared session_id
↓
_showSavedQRGrid() grouped
Bottle lifecycle
🧫 Prepared
→
💉 Inoculated
date_inoculated set
→
🌱 Growing
→
✂️ Subcultured
last_transfer set
→
🏡 Send to GH
sendToGreenhouse()
or terminal:
☣️ Contaminated
|
🗑 Discarded
THREE CREATION MODES — toggled by setBotMode():

SINGLE (qty=1):
  startNewBottle('single') → setBotMode('single') → show form, hide session builder
  saveBottleAction():
  → read form: species, stage, status, recipe_id, accession_id, note_id, media_volume,
               explants, next_review, flair_note, notes, flair_ids, date_prepared,
               date_inoculated, greenhouse_plant_id
  → build base = {recipe_id, species, accession_id, stage, status, ...}
  → code = FSL-{year}-{_botNextSeq()} (max existing seq + 1, zero-padded to 4 digits)
  → id = uid(); push to S.bottles
  → S.bottlesSha = await saveBottles(S.bottles, S.bottlesSha)  ← ghPut bottles/data.enc
  → renderBottleList(); closeNavDrawer()
  → openBottle(S.curBot)   ← populates bot-detail + generates QR canvas

BATCH (qty > 1):
  setBotMode('batch') → shows qty field
  saveBottleAction():
  → loop qty times: each gets id=uid(), code=FSL-{year}-{seq+i}, shared batch_id=uid()
  → push all to S.bottles, save in one ghPut
  → renderBottleList(); closeNavDrawer()
  → _showSavedQRGrid(newBottles, label)  ← renders all labels using LABEL_CONFIGS[0]
  → clicking a QR card → openBottle(id)

SESSION (autoclave run with multiple batches):
  setBotMode('session') → hides form fields, shows session builder div
  addSessionBatch() → push {species,stage,recipe,qty} to UI batch rows
  Capacity bar: total qty vs autoclave capacity → yellow >90%, red >100%
  saveSessionAction():
  → collect all batch rows from DOM
  → for each batch: loop qty, generate bottles with shared batch_id + session_id
  → create session record: {id, date, batches[], autoclave params}
  → S.sessions.push(session); all bottles pushed to S.bottles
  → saveBottles(S.bottles, S.bottlesSha, S.sessions)  ← single ghPut
  → renderBottleList(); closeNavDrawer()
  → _showSavedQRGrid(allNewBottles, label) grouped by batch

EDIT:
  startEditBottle(id) → populate form from S.bottles[id] → S.editingBot = id
  saveBottleAction() edit branch:
  → S.bottles[idx] = {...existing, ...base}
  → saveBottles → renderBottleList; openBottle(S.curBot); closeNavDrawer()

DELETE:
  deleteBottle(id) → confirm → S.bottles.filter(remove) → saveBottles → renderBottleList → showBotEmpty

STATUS UPDATE (lifecycle stepper):
  updateBottleStatus(id, newStatus):
  → S.bottles[idx].status = newStatus
  → if newStatus==='inoculated': set date_inoculated
  → if newStatus==='subcultured': set last_transfer
  → saveBottles → renderBottleList; openBottle(S.curBot); closeNavDrawer()

  Stepper buttons in bot-detail (generated by openBottle):
  → BOT_STATUS_NEXT: prepared→inoculated, inoculated→growing, growing→subcultured
  → terminal buttons: subcultured, contaminated, discarded
  → ghBtn: 🏡 Send to GH → sendToGreenhouse(id)

FILTER SYSTEM:
  setBotFilter(f):
    S.bottleFilter = f
    S.botBatchFilter = null   ← clears batch context
    renderBottleList()

  viewBatch(batchId):             ← NEW: fixes broken "View all in batch" link
    S.botBatchFilter = batchId
    S.bottleFilter = 'all'; S.bottleSearch = ''
    openNavDrawer(); renderBottleList()

  renderBottleList() filter priority:
    1. S.botBatchFilter → filter by batch_id (overrides everything)
    2. S.bottleFilter → filter by status (if not 'all')
    3. S.bottleSearch → text search (code, species, notes)
    4. Sort by date_prepared desc

QR & LABEL SYSTEM:
  6 LABEL_CONFIGS: 58mm-full, 58mm-compact, 62mm-full, A4-4up, A4-2up, A4-QR-only
  Each config: {id, name, w, h, qr (px), fields[], css}

  openBottle() inline QR:
  → canvas id=bot-qr-{id} inside bot-detail HTML
  → QRCode.toCanvas(canvas, 'https://notes.tcplants.in?bottle={id}', {width:130})
  → Size selector buttons: 58mm/62mm/a4 → _setLabelSize()

  _toggleLabelPanel(id):
  → _renderLabelPanel(id) → scope selector (this bottle / all in batch)
  → scope==='batch' → S.bottles.filter(x=>x.batch_id===b.batch_id)
  → _botLabelHtmlConfig(b, cfg) → HTML label with QR canvas + fields
  → printBottleLabel(id) / printBatchLabels(batchId) → print window

  _showSavedQRGrid(bottles, label):
  → bot-detail.innerHTML = grid of _botLabelHtmlConfig(b, LABEL_CONFIGS[0])
  → requestAnimationFrame → QRCode.toCanvas for each bot-label-qr-{id}
  → Print all button → _printSavedQRs(ids)

CROSS-SECTION LINKS from bot-detail:
  Accession  → navTo('registry');openAccession(acc.id)
  Recipe     → navTo('recipes');openRecipe(rec.id)
  Linked note → navTo('notes');openNote(note.id)
  Source GH plant → navTo('greenhouse');openGHPlant(srcPlant.id)
  Batch link → viewBatch(b.batch_id)   ← opens drawer + filters to batch members

_botNextSeq():
  → max of all FSL-YYYY-NNNN codes parsed as integers → +1
  → if no existing bottles → returns 1

Passage Tracking (v3.11)

WhereWhat
Bottle editor"Source bottle (passage)" text input → bot-parent-code. Live lookup hint shows species/status (green=found, red=not found).
saveBottleAction()Resolves parent code → parent_id stored on new bottle.
openBottle()Shows "Passaged from" row (link to parent) + "Passaged bottles" section (children with ↓ arrow chips).
🤖
Ravana AI — Context, Routing, Voice
6 tools · 2 STT modes · 18 voice commands · wake word · tool-use gate
askAI()_buildAIContext()_parseVoiceAction()
›

🤖 Ravana AI — Context, Routing, Tool-Use

AI request routing
askAI(prompt)
user message
→
_buildAIContext()
notes · bottles · species · analytics · weather · schedule
→
_selectAIProvider()
groq / claude / gemini
→
_callAIProxyFull()
→ plantking.ape.workers.dev
↓ response
text reply
renderAIReply()
tool_call
_handleToolCall() → _executeTool()
get_lab_summary
get_bottles
get_species_analysis
search_lab
update_bottle_status ⚠️ confirm
CONTEXT BUILDING — _buildAIContext():
  assembles a structured prompt snapshot:
  → lab identity (name from settings)
  → notes (10 most recent): title, type, stage, species, date, preview
  → bottles (10 most recent active): code, species, stage, status, recipe, next_review
  → species summary: S.taxSpecies + S.taxCustom.species → grouped by category
  → analytics snapshot: S.analytics (contamination rates, success rates)
  → schedule: overdue bottles + notes + due-this-week
  → journal (3 recent): title, date, parsed flag
  → recipes (5): name, base media
  → greenhouse (5 plants): species, quantity, health, location
  → weather: S.weather lab + greenhouse readings
  → supplies: low-stock items

  Context is sanitized via _sanitizeContextData() to strip special chars (Haiku addition, prevents prompt injection)

PROVIDER SELECTION — _selectAIProvider():
  reads S.aiModel ('groq'|'claude'|'gemini') from settings
  → groq: llama-3.3-70b-versatile (default)
  → claude: claude-opus-4-5
  → gemini: via Gemini API (legacy, less used now)

ROUTING — askAI(prompt):
  if _aiProxyURL set:
    → _callAIProxyFull(provider, model, messages, clientKey)
    → POST {_aiProxyURL}/api/ai/chat  ← Cloudflare Worker at plantking.ape.workers.dev
    → body: {provider, model, messages, max_tokens, system, tools}
    → if tool_call in response → _handleToolCall(tool_call) → _executeTool
  else:
    → _callAIDirect(provider, model, prompt, key)
    → direct browser API call (fallback, key exposed)

  Default proxy: localStorage('tcplants_ai_proxy_url') || 'https://plantking.ape.workers.dev'

TOOL DISPATCH — _executeTool(name, params):
  get_lab_summary   → returns formatted S.notes + S.bottles + analytics snapshot
  get_bottles       → S.bottles filtered by species/status params
  get_species_analysis → LabAnalytics + bottle history for species
  fetch_taxonomy_updates → ghGet taxonomy pack file → species list
  search_lab        → cross-section text search
  get_schedule      → overdue + due-this-week from all sections

  WRITE OPS (require confirmation gate):
  update_bottle_status(bottle_id, status):
    → _pendingToolConfirm = {name, params}
    → show confirmation banner in AI panel
    → user clicks Confirm → _executeWriteOp
    → find bottle → update status → saveBottles → renderBottleList; openBottle

  create_note, create_bottle, log_contam → similar confirmation gate (pending implementation)

VOICE INTEGRATION:
  _voiceCfg():
    returns {mode:'nat'|'wsp', confirm:bool, tts:bool, wakeWord:bool, labMode:bool}
    Lab mode forces: mode='wsp', confirm=false, tts=true, wakeWord=true

  Native STT path:
    _startNativeSR() → SpeechRecognition({continuous, interimResults, lang:en-IN})
    → onresult: interim words shown in AI textarea live
    → onfinal: transcript → if !confirm: askAI(); if confirm: _showVoiceConfirm

  Whisper path:
    _startRecording() → MediaRecorder(getUserMedia) → collect blobs
    3.5s silence grace → _stopRecording() → Blob → _transcribeWhisper()
    → POST {proxy}/api/ai/whisper with FormData(audio_file, model='whisper-large-v3')
    → transcript → if confirm: show #ai-voice-confirm; if !confirm: askAI()

  Wake word:
    if wakeWord enabled → SpeechRecognition always-on → listen for 'hey lab'/'hey ravana'
    → arm → full voice input cycle → 'bye lab'/'bye ravana' → disarm
    #wake-armed-dot indicator shows when armed

QUOTA CHECK — _isAtQuota() (Task #8):
  checks localStorage token usage counters
  compares against AI_LIMITS for selected provider
  if at quota → toast warning, skip API call

Voice Commands — full list (v3.11)

PatternActionAI call?
"home" / "dashboard"navTo('notes')No
"notes" / "bottles" / "greenhouse" / "recipes" / "registry" / "reminders" / "analytics"Navigate to that sectionNo
"settings" / "open scanner" / "sidebar" / "close"Open panel / close AINo
"read protocol N" / "read recipe N"TTS reads numbered recipe aloudNo
"what's overdue" / "how many bottles" / "latest note"TTS reads data summaryNo
"switch to deep" / "switch to Claude" / "switch to quick"Change AI modelNo
"whisper mode" / "native mode"Switch STT modeNo
"stop reading" / "stop"Stop TTS mid-sentenceNo
"add N bottles of [species]" (v3.11)startNewBottle('batch'), prefills species + qtyNo
"open bottle FSL-XXXX" (v3.11)Finds by code → navTo('bottles'); openBottleNo
"show species [name]" / "open species [name]" (v3.11)navTo('species'); openSpDetail(name)No
"export report" / "download report" (v3.11)exportLabReport('csv')No
Anything elseaskAI(transcript)Yes
🏡
Greenhouse — Plant Tracking & Transfers
Bidirectional bottle↔GH · QR tab (?gh=) · condition log · ledger
saveGHPlant()saveGHExplant()openGHPlant()
›

🏡 Greenhouse — Plant Tracking & Transfer Flows

Bidirectional GH ↔ Lab loop
🏡 GH Stock plant
S.greenhouse[] · quantity ledger
Take explant →
startNewBottle() / saveSessionAction()
greenhouse_plant_id wired · 🏡 flair pre-selected
TC growth →
sendToGreenhouse()
type:'lab_output_in' logged · quantity += N
Back to stock →
🏡 GH Stock grows
saveGreenhouse() → greenhouse/data.enc
GREENHOUSE PLANT CRUD:
  startNewGHPlant() → form: species, quantity, location, source, health, notes, next_inspection
  saveGHPlant() → push to S.greenhouse → saveGreenhouse(S.greenhouse, S.greenhouseSha, S.ghTransfers)
  openGHPlant(id) → detail tabs: overview, transfers, condition log, output plan, inspections
  editGHPlant(id) → populate form → save → renderGHList; openGHPlant

BOTTLE → GH TRANSFER (explant-out from bottle to greenhouse):
  sendToGreenhouse(bottleId):
  → find bottle → show transfer form (species, qty, destination)
  → saveGHExplant(bottleId, formData):
      transfer = {id, type:'explant_out', plant_id, bottle_id, date, quantity, notes}
      S.ghTransfers.push(transfer)
      saveGreenhouse(S.greenhouse, S.greenhouseSha, S.ghTransfers)
      → openGHPlant shows the transfer in transfer tab

GH → BOTTLE (bottle created FROM greenhouse plant):
  In bottle form: greenhouse_plant_id field → dropdown of GH plants by species
  On save: bottle.greenhouse_plant_id = plantId
  In openBottle(): 'Source plant' row links back to the GH plant

QUANTITY LEDGER:
  adjustQuantity(plantId, delta, reason):
  → p.quantity += delta
  → transfer = {type:'quantity_adjust', delta, reason, date}
  → S.ghTransfers.push(transfer)
  → saveGreenhouse → openGHPlant (ledger tab shows history)

CONDITION LOG:
  logCondition(plantId, health, notes):
  → p.health = health; p.last_inspection = today
  → transfer = {type:'health_log', health, notes, date}
  → saveGreenhouse → openGHPlant

saveGreenhouse(plants, sha, transfers):
  → data = {plants, transfers}
  → ghPut(GH_F, enc(JSON.stringify(data)), sha)
  → loadGreenhouse reads back: raw.plants, raw.transfers

QR on GH Plants (v3.11)

WhereWhat
Plant detail → 📷 QR tabQR code canvas (url: ?gh={id}), plant name/location, Print + Copy buttons
ghTab('qr')Calls _renderGHQRCanvas(S.curGH) → QRCode.toCanvas()
QR scanner / URL param?gh=id → navTo('greenhouse'); openGHPlant(id)
🏠
Dashboard — Render Pipeline
10 stat cards · 5 alert types · active strips · species grid
_renderDashboard()_computeAlerts()
›

🏠 Dashboard — Render Pipeline

_renderDashboard() is called at login and after saves. Static helper: C(area, content, extra) → <div class="dc" style="grid-area:area;extra">

10-Card Stat Band (v3.11)

CardValuenavTo
📋 NotesS.notes.lengthnotes
🫙 Bottlesactive count (inoculated + growing)bottles
🌿 AccessionsS.accs.lengthregistry
🏡 Greenhousetotal plant countgreenhouse
⏰ Overdueoverdue notes + bottles + GH plantsreminders
🧪 RecipesS.recs.lengthrecipes
📦 Supplieslow-stock count (yellow when >0)supply
☣️ Contam 30dcontam notes in last 30 days (red when >0)contam
💰 Vaultlive ₹ value (bottles × stage prices + GH × grade)value
📓 Journal 7djournal entries in last 7 daysjournal

Alert strip — _computeAlerts()

ConditionLevelnavTo
Species with >10% contam rate in 30dcritcontam
Any overdue next_review (bottles or notes)warnreminders
≥5 active bottles past 28d inoculationwarnbottles
GH plants with health ≠ healthywarngreenhouse
Supply batch expired or expiring <14dinfosupply
📊
Analytics Engine
12 charts · species ranking · lab cost · lifecycle · freshness fixed
LabAnalytics.calculate()renderAnalytics()_buildSpeciesRankingCard()
›

📊 Analytics Engine

Two systems — both kept in sync (v3.10)

SystemWhen it runsOutputConsumed by
LabAnalytics.calculate()Login + after saveNoteAction + after saveBottleAction (fixed v3.10)S.analytics: contam rates, success rates, multiplication, culture timeline, alerts_buildAIContext() — AI prompt context
renderAnalytics()Analytics section visitSVG charts inline-calculated from S.notes + S.bottlesAnalytics page UI only

Analytics page cards

CardData source
Notes / Month, Stage Donut, Contam Trend, Recipe Usage, Tag CloudS.notes (inline calculation)
Species Success Rate, Stage Funnel, Avg Days Between Entries, Media EfficiencyS.notes + S.bottles
Culture Lifecycle StatusActive bottles vs expected duration (historical avg or subculture_interval_days)
Species Performance Ranking (v3.11)_buildSpeciesRankingCard(): score/100, contam%, multiplication×, avg cycle days, active bottles — ranked table for all species ≥2 notes
Lab Cost Tracking (v3.11)_buildLabCostCard(): S.supplies items with cost_total + date_prepared → 6-month bar chart + total spend + estimated ₹/bottle
Feature UsageSection-visit counters in localStorage
📓
Lab Journal — Entry, Parse, Extract
Voice dictation · overnight parser · extract cards · parse toggle
parseJournalWithRavana()saveJournalEntry()_scheduleOvernightJournalParse()
›

📓 Lab Journal — Entry, Parse, Extract

CREATE:
  startNewJournalEntry() → clear form → show editor
  saveJournalEntry():
  → if editing: update entry.body, mark bodyChanged=true → reset parsed=false
  → else: new {id, title, body, date, tags, parseEnabled:true, parsed:false}
  → S.journal.unshift(entry) → saveJournal(S.journal, S.journalSha) → renderJournalList

VOICE DICTATION in journal:
  _journalMicTap():
  → if voiceCfg.mode === 'wsp': record → Whisper → transcript → append to je-body
  → else: SpeechRecognition → interim results live in je-body → final text appended

RAVANA PARSE:
  parseJournalWithRavana():
  → prompt: "Parse this lab journal entry and extract structured data as JSON"
  → JSON schema: {recipes:[{name,base,pgr,ph,notes}], species:[{name,category}], notes:[{title,type,stage,species,body}]}
  → askAI(prompt) → _renderJournalExtracts(data)
  → extract cards shown: "Create recipe", "Add species", "Create note"
  → _journalCreateRecipe(idx) → navTo('recipes'); populate recipe form
  → _journalCreateNote(idx)   → navTo('notes'); populate note form
  → _journalAddSpecies(idx)   → navTo('species'); trigger add form
  → _journalCreateAll()       → batch create all extracted items

OVERNIGHT BATCH PARSE:
  _scheduleOvernightJournalParse():
  → fires 8s after login
  → checks: unparsed entries with body.length > 30 AND parseEnabled !== false
  → if hasUnparsed AND (firstVisitToday OR forceFlag):
      show progress in journal parse banner
      for each unparsed: askAI(parse prompt) → mark parsed=true → saveJournal
  → re-renders journal list (parsed entries get ✦ badge)

PARSE TOGGLE:
  _setJournalParseEnabled(id, bool):
  → entry.parseEnabled = bool → saveJournal → renderJournalList
  → paused entries show ⏸ badge, skipped by overnight parser
🌱
Taxonomy — Packs, Custom Species, Flairs
Pack loading · autocomplete · species picker · CSV import · flairs
loadTaxonomy()_taxSuggest()_importCsvTaxonomy()
›

🌱 Taxonomy — Packs, Custom Species, Flairs

PACK LOADING — loadTaxonomy():
  TAX_PACKS map: {nepenthaceae:'carnivorous', orchidaceae:'orchids', musaceae:'banana', ...}
  enabled packs: from localStorage('tcplants_tax_enabled') or all enabled
  → for each enabled pack: fetch taxonomy/{category}/{pack}.json
  → merge into S.taxSpecies[] (canonical names)
  → S.taxFlairs[] from JSON flair definitions
  → also: ghGet(TAX_CUSTOM_FILE) → S.taxCustom.species + S.taxCustom.flairs

AUTOCOMPLETE — _taxSuggest(inputEl):
  triggered by: oninput on bot-species, ne-species, re-target fields
  → query = inputEl.value
  → filter S.taxSpecies + S.taxCustom.species by includes(query)
  → show #tax-dropdown div positioned under input
  → keyboard nav: _taxDropdownKeyNav → up/down arrow, Enter to select
  → _taxDropdownSelect(name) → fill input, hide dropdown, trigger related fields
    (e.g., species → populate accession dropdown, GH plant dropdown)

SPECIES PICKER MODAL:
  openSpeciesPicker(targetFieldId):
  → shows #species-picker-modal
  → browse by category or search
  → select → fill targetFieldId input

CSV IMPORT:
  _importCsvTaxonomy(csvText):
  → parse CSV: columns Name,Category,CommonName,Source
  → validate each row → push to S.taxCustom.species
  → saveCustomTaxonomy() → ghPut(TAX_CUSTOM_FILE, enc(JSON.stringify(S.taxCustom)), sha)
  → _writeCache(); renderSpecies()

FLAIRS:
  S.taxFlairs + S.taxCustom.flairs → combined in _botFlairHtml(flair_ids)
  → colored pills in bottle detail + list
  → flair picker in bottle editor: click to toggle flair_ids[]
⏰
Reminders — Badge, List, Navigation
3 sources (notes/bottles/GH) · urgency groups · nav badge count
renderReminders()updateReminderBadge()
›
— Badge, List, Navigation 
DATA SOURCES (all in-memory, no dedicated file):
  Bottles with next_review: S.bottles.filter(next_review exists + status active)
  Notes with next_review:   S.notes.filter(next_review exists)
  GH plants with next_inspection: S.greenhouse.filter(next_inspection exists)

renderReminders():
  → overdueBot: next_review < today + status∈['inoculated','growing']
     act: navTo('bottles');openBottle(id)
  → overdueNote: next_review < today
     act: navTo('notes');openNote(id)          ← fixed (was missing navTo)
  → overdueGH: next_inspection < today
     act: navTo('greenhouse');openGHPlant(id)
  → dueBot/dueNote: within next 7 days (same pattern)
  → ghXferDue: inoculated bottles > 28 days ago (based on date_inoculated)
  → sort all by days remaining
  → render .rem-card divs with data-id, data-isBottle, data-isGh attrs

Tap handler (_setupTap):
  .rem-card → isGh=1: navTo('greenhouse');openGHPlant
           → isBottle=1: navTo('bottles');openBottle   ← fixed
           → else: navTo('notes');openNote              ← fixed

updateReminderBadge():
  → count total overdue items → #nd-rbadge.textContent + show/hide
  → called after: login, saveNoteAction, saveBottleAction, saveGHPlant, deleteNote

Badge triggers (cyclic dependency awareness):
  saving a note → saveNoteAction → updateReminderBadge (in line with render)
  saving a bottle → no auto-badge update (gap — badge may be stale after bottle edits)
🔍
Search System — Cross-Section
8 sources · tokenized AND · field prefixes · highlighting · recent searches
SearchSystem._run()SearchSystem._hl()_extractKeywords()
›
System — Cross-Section 
SearchSystem.renderSearchPage():
  → #search-main page with input + saved filter chips
  → oninput → _doSearch(query)

_doSearch(query):
  → notes: title/body_preview/species/tags includes query
  → bottles: code/species/notes includes query
  → accs: species/accession_id/source includes query
  → recs: name/base/notes includes query
  → gh: species/location/notes includes query
  → render grouped results with sec() + row() helpers

Result navigation:
  Notes   → navTo('notes');openNote(id)            ← fixed (was openNote only)
  Bottles → navTo('bottles');openBottle(id)
  Accs    → navTo('registry');openAccession(id)
  Recipes → navTo('recipes');openRecipe(id)
  GH      → navTo('greenhouse');openGHPlant(id)

Saved filters:
  localStorage('tcplants_search_filters') → up to 20 saved filter strings
  chip click → fill input → trigger search
📦
Inventory — Two Systems
Supply = primary · Stock redirects to Supply · batch perf correlation
SupplyInventory.renderInventoryPage()calcPerformance()
›

📦 Inventory — Two Systems

SystemStateFileLoadUse case
Stock (nav → 📦 Stock)
⚠️ Redirects to Supply since v3.11		 S_inv = {items:[]} — separate object inventory/data.enc On section visit (not at login) Reagents with low-stock thresholds, category tabs
Supply Inventory (nav → 📦 Supplies) — primary S.supplies[] — part of main S supplies/data.enc loadSupplies() at login (8th Promise.all) Media prep batches + TC performance correlation
📦 Stock section now redirects to Supply via switchSection() early return. Supply is the primary inventory system — batch cards with expiry, cost/unit, and contamination correlation.

calcPerformance(item): finds bottles prepared within date_prepared → next_batch window → calculates contamRate + successRate vs lab average. Flags if >10% worse.

📅
Calendar — Month Grid & Day Panel
Month grid · day panel · create from date · ICS export
renderCalendar()_openCalPanel()
›
— Month Grid & Day Panel 
renderCalendar():
  → S.calYear, S.calMonth → build month grid
  → each day cell: count notes + bottles with dates in that day
  → click day → _openCalPanel(date) → #cdp-list

_openCalPanel(date):
  S.calSelDate = date
  → filter S.notes: date slice = date
  → filter S.bottles: date_prepared/date_inoculated slice = date
  → filter S.journal: date slice = date
  → filter S.greenhouse: next_inspection = date
  → render .cdp-card divs with data-id, data-isBottle attrs

Tap handler (cdp-list):
  isBottle=1 → navTo('bottles');openBottle(id)   ← fixed
  else       → navTo('notes');openNote(id)         ← fixed

New note from calendar:
  click day → 'New entry for this date' button
  S.calDate = date → navTo('notes') → startNewNote()
  in saveNoteAction: date = new Date(S.calDate).toISOString(); S.calDate=null

Month navigation: S.calMonth/calYear ±1 → re-renderCalendar

Export: _exportCalRange(start, end) → format events as .ics / markdown
🌡️
Weather, Activity Log, Service Worker
Open-Meteo dual location · 60s interval · last 30 commits · SW cache
fetchWeather()fetchActivityLog()
›
, Activity Log, Service Worker 
WEATHER:
  fetchWeather():
  → navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition → lat/lon
    OR stored coords from settings
  → fetch OpenMeteo API: current temp, real-feel, humidity, UV, rain
  → S.weather = {lab:{...}, gh:{...}, updatedAt: now}
  → update #weather-chip button text
  → called at login + every 60s via window._wxInterval

  Dual location: lab coords + greenhouse coords (separate settings)
  If geolocation denied: uses stored coords or shows error

ACTIVITY LOG:
  fetchActivityLog():
  → GET /repos/Phyto-Evolution/tcplants/commits?per_page=30
  → render .al-clickable items (commits that contain note titles)
  → click → find note by title → closeActLog(); navTo('notes'); openNote(id)   ← fixed
  → auto-refresh every session on login

SERVICE WORKER (sw.js):
  Cache strategy: network-first for index.html, cache-first for CDN assets
  Cache name bumped manually (SW_CACHE version) to force refresh
  Registration: navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')
  Offline: navigator.onLine → #offline-pill shown
  Write ops blocked when offline via _checkOnline()
  ⚠️  Only loadNotesIndex + saveNotesIndex wrapped with offline check (Haiku, inconsistent)
🌍
GBIF Integration — 6 Features (A–F)
Synonym resolver · common names · distributions · photo · hierarchy · bulk CP
_gbifImportSpecies()_loadSpDetailGBIF()_gbifBulkImportCP()
›

🌍 GBIF Integration — 6 Features (v3.10–v3.11)

FeatureWhere triggeredWhat it doesState written
A — Synonym resolverCustom species form (_taxGBIFLookup()) + species detail panel (_loadSpDetailGBIF())If GBIF returns synonym=true, shows yellow banner with accepted name + "Use accepted name →" swap buttonAuto-fills form
B — Common names_gbifImportSpecies()Fetches vernacularNames in parallel with IUCN. English name (or first available) auto-fills common_name fieldsp.common_name
C — Native distributions_loadSpDetailGBIF()Fetches distributions, filters NATIVE/ENDEMIC status, shows compact country tag row in species detail panelUI only
D — Reference photo_loadSpDetailGBIF()Fetches media?type=StillImage&limit=1, injects photo div with rights credit below Summary block. onerror hides silently.UI only
E — Taxonomy hierarchy_gbifImportSpecies() 3rd parallel fetchFetches GET /v1/species/{key} for order/class/kingdom. Saved on the sp object in taxCustom.sp.gbif_order, gbif_class, gbif_kingdom
F — Bulk CP genera import"🌿 Import CP Checklist" button in GBIF tab_gbifBulkImportCP(): fetches 5 family keys in parallel (Nepenthaceae, Droseraceae, Sarraceniaceae, Lentibulariaceae, Cephalotaceae). Deduplicates, skips already-imported, batch-inserts to taxCustom.S.taxCustom.species[]

All 6 features use Promise.allSettled() internally — network failures degrade gracefully without crashing the UI.

💰
Value Inventory — Vault Calculation
8 price tiers · live vault · GH size_grade · INR formatting
renderValueSection()_valPriceSet()loadValue()
›

💰 Value Inventory — Vault Calculation (v3.10)

Nav drawer → 💰 Value. Estimates live inventory value from bottles + greenhouse stock using user-configured base prices.

ComponentDetail
Prices tab8 base prices: bottles by stage (I–IV, Weaned, Rooting) + GH plants by size_grade (Seedling/Small/Medium/Adult). Saved to S.value.prices with 800ms debounce auto-save.
Vault tabLive calculated: Σ(bottles by stage × stagePrice) + Σ(GH plants × gradePrice × quantity). Species-level breakdown with overrides (pending). Vault total shown in INR.
Dashboard stat cardCompact ₹ value — formatted with fmtINR() (Indian locale: ₹12k / ₹1.2L)
GH plant size_gradeNew field on GH plant form: Seedling / Small / Medium / Adult. Used in vault calculation.
StateS.value = {prices:{}, overrides:{}} · S.valueSha — 8th load in login Promise.all
Filevalue/data.enc
📥
Export System (v3.11)
3-CSV download · print report · voice trigger · legacy ZIP/CSV
exportLabReport()_downloadText()
›

📥 Export System (v3.11)

FunctionModeOutput
exportLabReport('csv')CSV3 separate Blob downloads: bottles.csv (code/species/stage/status/dates/recipe/batch/parent/notes), notes.csv (date/title/type/stage/species/cultures_out/recipe/tags), greenhouse.csv (species/location/qty/health/size_grade). Uses Blob + <a download> pattern.
exportLabReport('print')PrintGenerates styled HTML with summary stat band + active bottles table + GH plants table. Opens in new window, auto-prints via window.onload.
Analytics export buttonsCSV + Print"📥 Export CSV" + "🖨 Print Report" in analytics header.
Voice command"export report" / "download report"Calls exportLabReport('csv') directly.

Legacy exports (always available)

ButtonOutput
⬇ ZIPAll notes as decrypted Markdown + accessions + recipes as JSON
CSV (top bar)Note metadata CSV + accessions CSV
📅 Calendar exportPrint-ready HTML: this week / this month

Known Gaps & Latent Bugs
7 fixed · 4 open · 1 priority queue item
Telegram frozen CSP pending Agentic Ravana ›

Known Gaps & Latent Bugs

IssueLocationImpactStatus
loadInv() missing ghDec()Fixed v3.9Stock data unreadable if inventory/data.enc exists✅ Fixed
S.analytics goes stale after savesFixed v3.10Now: LabAnalytics.calculate() called after saveNoteAction + saveBottleAction✅ Fixed
renderAnalytics() vs S.analytics disconnectrenderAnalytics()renderAnalytics() recalculates inline — S.analytics used only by AI context. Not a bug, but duplicate computation.Design debt
SupplyInventory.items dead assignmentFixed v3.9Dead code — renderInventoryPage() uses S.supplies directly✅ Fixed
validateBottleData wrong status listFixed v3.9Now includes all 10 statuses✅ Fixed
Batch checkbox invisibleFixed v3.9CSS width:100% scoped to text inputs only✅ Fixed
Offline check inconsistencyFixed v3.10Removed Haiku monkey-patches — all load functions fail naturally on network error✅ Fixed
updateReminderBadge not called after bottle savesFixed v3.8Badge now updates after all saves✅ Fixed
Telegram integration frozenSettings UI exists, function commented outAlert settings visible but non-functionalFrozen
Two inventory systems (Stock ≠ Supply)Stock now redirects to Supply (v3.11)Stock UI still exists but unreachable. Low-stock alerts use S.supplies.Partially resolved
Agentic Ravana tool-useaskAI() / _executeTool()Write tools (create_note, create_bottle, log_contam) have confirm gate scaffolded but not fully implementedPending — priority queue
🌿 TC Plants
🔍
🔍
🔍
🔍
🔍
⬆ Import Greenhouse Plants
Upload a CSV file or paste rows directly — all entries get the 🏡 GH flair automatically
📋 CSV column format
ColumnRequiredAllowed values / notes
species✓ requiredAny name. Hybrids with commas: wrap in quotes — "Nep × (rajah × lowii)"
quantityoptionalInteger (default: 1)
healthoptionalhealthy · stressed · dormant · declined (default: healthy)
sourceoptionalgreenhouse · seeds · wild · other-lab · nursery (default: greenhouse)
locationoptionalBench / section label — used for ⊞ Bench view grouping
next_inspectionoptionalDate: YYYY-MM-DD
accession_numberoptionalStored as a reference note on the plant
notesoptionalFree text observations
The first row must be the header. Column order must match exactly. Download the template for a ready-to-fill file.

Hey Lab
⚡ Ravana
Get key ↗
Say "send" or "re-listen"
Greetings! I am Ravana, your TC lab assistant. I can help with protocols, species info, PGR doses, contamination analysis, and note summaries. What would you like to know?
Insert link to note

⚙️ Settings

Appearance
Theme
Dark or light mode
Ravana skin
Claude Design visual layer — gradient AI accents, enhanced button glow, richer depth. Experimental. Toggle off to revert instantly.
AI — Ravana
✓ Keys live in Cloudflare — API keys are server-side in the plantking Worker. Nothing to manage here.
Model
AI Proxy (Cloudflare)
Worker URL
Your Cloudflare Worker URL. When set, all AI calls route through it and your API keys stay server-side.
Voice & Lab Mode
🧪 Lab Mode
Hands-free. Skips confirmation, auto-speaks Ravana's answer, always Whisper, wake word on. Designed for gloves-on lab work.
Input
STT Mode
Native = Chrome built-in · Whisper = Groq (accurate)
Confirm before send
TTS reads transcript back, wait for "send" / "re-listen"
Voice confirm commands
Say "send" / "re-listen" to confirm (else tap buttons)
Wake word "Hey Lab" Experimental
Activates voice from anywhere in the app
Auto-send after transcription
Sends immediately, no review step
Silence threshold
Seconds of silence before auto-stop recording
2s
Output (TTS)
Read AI replies aloud
Auto-plays when panel is open
Voice
Speed
0.8× 1.0×
Pitch
Low High
Noise & Mic
Noise suppression
Hardware-level via browser (Chrome/Android)
Echo cancellation
Prevents TTS playback feeding back into mic
Auto gain control
Normalises mic level in noisy environments
Noise gate threshold
Ignore audio below this level (0 = off, higher = quieter sounds ignored)
Off 10
Camera & QR
Scan Enhancement
Boost contrast for low-light QR scans
Try Harder Mode
Slower but more thorough QR detection
Data & Privacy
Clear Local Cache
Force reload from GitHub on next login
Forget Trusted Device
Remove saved encrypted token
Reset Usage Stats
Clear feature usage metrics
Clear Voice Transcripts
Deletes local voice session dump (last 200 entries)
🌿
TC Plants Lab Notes
v2.0 · AES-256-GCM encrypted · GitHub-backed
Built for plant tissue culture labs.
Data never leaves your browser unencrypted.
⚡ Activity
tcplants@github — activity log
